_comment: Testimonial carousel data for the homepage. Each item controls the displayed person/name, story text, avatar image, and social links.

testimonials.name: Alex Rivera
testimonials.title: Tagaytay Loop
testimonials.text: The climb was steady, the air was cool, and the view made every hard pedal worth it.

testimonials.name: Mika Santos
testimonials.title: Mt. Batulao Summit
testimonials.text: The trail had sharp ridgelines and a summit view that felt like a proper reward.

testimonials.name: Jon Cruz
testimonials.title: Nasugbu Coastal Ride
testimonials.text: Long roads, sea breeze, and good pacing made this one of the smoothest rides.

testimonials.name: Rae Lim
testimonials.title: Pagsanjan Loop
testimonials.text: Quiet roads and forest views made the ride feel calm even when the legs were tired.

testimonials.name: Leo Tan
testimonials.title: Tagaytay Loop
testimonials.text: The climb was steady, the air was cool, and the view made every hard pedal worth it.

testimonials.name: Dan Druffe
testimonials.title: Hsinchu zoo
testimonials.text: Ang galing parang tangaa lang. sample lang to.
